title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.507 - Information may be required by department of commerce and insurance
text:
374.507.  Information may be required by department of commerce and insurance. — In conjunction with the application, the utilization review agent shall submit additional information as required by the department of commerce and insurance.
(L. 1991 S.B. 352 § 4, A.L. 1997 H.B. 335)
